name: claude-operator
description: Autonomous multi-worker orchestrator MCP server for Claude Code — decomposes goals, spawns workers, manages two-tier memory, enforces guardrails.

tools.name: assign_task
tools.description: Create a task with goal, project path, priority, and constraints

tools.name: spawn_worker
tools.description: Launch a Claude Code worker (named or headless) on an isolated git worktree

tools.name: get_worker_status
tools.description: Poll worker state, heartbeat age, and current task

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task done, merge the worktree branch, and clean up

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: FTS5 full-text search across operator memory

tools.name: update_memory
tools.description: Write or update a memory entry with tier and confidence score

tools.name: set_guardrail
tools.description: Add or update a guardrail rule

tools.name: inject_instruction
tools.description: Send an instruction to a running worker via file bus

tools.name: log_judgment_call
tools.description: Record a human judgment call for retrospective learning
